title: rubus horridus var. viridis
intro: Rubus horridus var. viridis, also known as the green bramble, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the blackthorn plant, characterized by its green stems and leaves. The medicinal properties of Rubus horridus var. viridis are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rubus horridus var. viridis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
